sequence.title: sequence
sequence.description:
sequence represents the order of events. It's always counting

 on read: the sequence of the last event reduced by the projection

 on manipulation: the timestamp of the event(s) added by the manipulation

changeDate.title: change_date
changeDate.description:
change_date is the timestamp when the object was changed

 on read: the timestamp of the last event reduced by the projection

 on manipulation: the timestamp of the event(s) added by the manipulation

resourceOwner.title: resource_owner
resourceOwner.description: resource_owner is the organization or instance_id an object belongs to

creationDate.title: creation_date
creationDate.description: creation_date is the timestamp where the first operation on the object was made

organizationId.title: organization_id
organizationId.description: OrganizationID is the unique identifier of the organization the domain belongs to.

domain.title: domain
domain.description: Domain is the fully qualified domain name.

isVerified.title: is_verified
isVerified.description: IsVerified is a boolean flag indicating if the domain has been verified.

isPrimary.title: is_primary
isPrimary.description: IsPrimary is a boolean flag indicating if the domain is the primary domain of the organization.

validationType.title: validation_type
validationType.description: ValidationType indicates the protocol used to validate the domain ownership.

id.title: id
id.description: ID is the unique identifier of the organization.

details.title: details
details.description: Details about the organizations' creation and change date.

state.title: state
state.description: Current state of the organization, for example active, inactive or deleted.

primaryDomain.title: primary_domain
primaryDomain.description: Primary domain used in the organization.
